message:
[LOW] fcp-telemetry: fix std::fmt vs tracing_subscriber::fmt import shadow

`use std::fmt;` and `use tracing_subscriber::{fmt::{self, ...}};` in
logging.rs collided (E0252), leaving `fmt::layer()` unresolvable
(E0425). That broke every downstream build — caught while verifying a
fcp-store security patch.

Renamed std's import to `std_fmt` so the tracing_subscriber `fmt`
module stays unshadowed and `sanitize_log_value` keeps its Display
bound through `std_fmt::Display`. No runtime behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
